metadata.title: KORT.X — Digital Studio
metadata.description: Design and technology studio. We craft digital products, websites and systems that drive real results.
metadata.keywords: digital studio, design, development, web, apps, KORT.X

hero.subtitle: We build custom digital solutions for companies that want to grow.

services.label: What we do
services.title: Services that move businesses
services.subtitle: From concept to deploy. Every project is built to perform, not just look pretty.

items.title: Web Design & Dev
items.description: Websites that convert. Original design, clean code, peak performance. Next.js, React, Tailwind.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Native and cross-platform apps people actually use. From idea to App Store.

items.title: Systems & Dashboards
items.description: Custom panels, CRMs and internal tools. Automate what slows your operation down.

items.title: Branding & UI/UX
items.description: Visual identity that sets you apart. Interfaces users understand without a manual.

items.title: E-commerce
items.description: Online stores that actually sell. Optimized checkout, simplified management.

items.title: AI & Automation
items.description: Chatbots, automations and AI integrations that save hours and cut costs.

work.label: Selected work
work.title: Results, not promises
work.subtitle: Some of the projects we've built recently. Client names preserved under contractual agreement.

projects.title: SaaS Management Platform
projects.description: Complete dashboard with real-time analytics, team management and automations.

projects.title: Health & Wellness App
projects.description: iOS/Android app with habit tracking, scheduling and telemedicine.

projects.title: Premium Fashion E-commerce
projects.description: Online store with immersive experience, AR try-on and 1-click checkout.

projects.title: Corporate Portal
projects.description: Multilingual corporate site with headless CMS and maximum performance.

projects.title: Educational Platform
projects.description: Complete LMS with video lessons, interactive quizzes and auto-certification.

projects.title: Logistics System
projects.description: Control panel with real-time tracking, route optimization and reports.

about.label: About us
about.title: We're not a website factory
about.description1: We're a lean studio of designers and engineers who treat every project like it's our own. No templates, no fluff, no layers of management between you and the people who actually build.
about.description2: Offices in Orlando and Rio de Janeiro. We operate global, think local. Every delivery ships with the same obsession for detail — from wireframe to deploy.

items.quote: They delivered in 3 weeks what another agency would take 3 months. And the quality was insane.
items.author: CEO

items.quote: The new site tripled our conversions in 60 days. Insane ROI.
items.author: Head of Marketing

items.quote: For the first time I felt like the agency understood what I needed before I explained it.
items.author: Founder

items.quote: The system they built eliminated 40 hours of manual work per week from my team.
items.author: COO

cta.title: Let's build something that matters?
cta.subtitle: Tell us what you need. We respond in less than 24h.

servicesPage.title: Our Services
servicesPage.subtitle: Complete design and development solutions for companies serious about growth.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: We understand your business, market and goals. No generic briefs.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Wireframes, interactive prototypes and final design. You approve every step.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Clean code, performance, testing. We deliver running, not in a PDF.

steps.title: Launch & Scale
steps.description: Deploy, monitoring, continuous optimization. Your project doesn't die after launch.

portfolioPage.title: Our work
portfolioPage.subtitle: A selection of recent projects. Names preserved under contractual agreement.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.description: Build digital products that solve real problems. No buzzwords, no pretty slide decks that never ship. Code that runs, design that converts, results that show.

values.title: Obsession with quality
values.description: Every pixel, every line of code. We don't ship anything we wouldn't use ourselves.

values.title: Radical transparency
values.description: You know what's happening at every moment. No surprises, no hidden costs.

values.title: Real speed
values.description: Lean team = less bureaucracy. We deliver fast without cutting corners.

values.title: Partnership, not service
values.description: We're not vendors. We're your tech team for the duration of the project.

team.title: The team
team.description: Designers, engineers and strategists who've been through startups, agencies and big tech. Now together in a studio that does things right.

contactPage.title: Get in touch
contactPage.subtitle: Tell us about your project. We respond in less than 24 hours.

form.name: Full name
form.message: Tell us more about the project
form.success: Message sent! We'll be in touch soon.
